description: A sampling event record aligned with Darwin Core Event class. Enables star-schema pattern where multiple occurrences reference a shared event context (location, protocol, effort).

main.description: A sampling or collecting event. Multiple dwc.occurrence records can reference the same event via eventRef, sharing location and protocol metadata.

eventID.description: An identifier for the event. Should be globally unique or unique within the dataset.

parentEventID.description: An identifier for the broader event that this event is part of (e.g., a survey campaign that contains multiple transects).

parentEventRef.description: AT-URI reference to the parent app.gainforest.dwc.event record.

eventDate.description: The date or date range during which the event occurred. ISO 8601 format (e.g., '2024-03-15', '2024-03-15/2024-03-17').

eventTime.description: The time or time range during which the event occurred. ISO 8601 format (e.g., '06:30:00', '06:30:00/09:00:00').

habitat.description: A category or description of the habitat in which the event occurred (e.g., 'primary tropical rainforest', 'degraded pasture', 'riparian zone').

samplingProtocol.description: The names of, references to, or descriptions of the methods used during the event (e.g., 'camera trap array', 'line transect distance sampling', 'audio point count 10-min').

sampleSizeValue.description: A numeric value for a measurement of the size of a sample in the event (e.g., '20', '0.25').

sampleSizeUnit.description: The unit of measurement for the sampleSizeValue (e.g., 'square meters', 'hectares', 'trap-nights').

samplingEffort.description: The amount of effort expended during the event (e.g., '3 person-hours', '14 trap-nights', '2 km transect walked').

fieldNotes.description: Notes or a reference to notes taken in the field about the event.

eventRemarks.description: Comments or notes about the event.

locationID.description: Identifier for the location where the event occurred.

decimalLatitude.description: Geographic latitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). Range: -90 to 90.

decimalLongitude.description: Geographic longitude in decimal degrees (WGS84). Range: -180 to 180.

coordinateUncertaintyInMeters.description: Uncertainty radius in meters around the coordinates.

minimumElevationInMeters.description: Lower limit of elevation range in meters above sea level.

maximumElevationInMeters.description: Upper limit of elevation range in meters above sea level.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of record creation in the ATProto PDS.

projectRef.description: AT-URI reference to the organization info record.

siteRef.description: AT-URI reference to the organization site record.

monitoringProgramme.description: Name of the monitoring programme (e.g., 'Annual Biodiversity Survey 2025').

monitoringFrequency.description: How often this type of event recurs (e.g., 'monthly', 'quarterly', 'annual', 'one-time').

teamSize.description: Number of people involved in the event.

recordedBy.description: Person(s) who conducted the event. Pipe-delimited for multiple people (e.g., 'Jane Smith | John Doe').

recordedByID.description: ORCID or other persistent identifiers for the recorder(s). Pipe-delimited for multiple IDs.

equipmentUsed.description: Description of equipment used during the event.

qualityControlNotes.description: Notes on data quality issues encountered during or after the event.

completeness.description: Assessment of survey completeness (e.g., 'complete', 'partial - rain stopped survey', 'incomplete').
